text: - 6.5 PUNCHLIST WORK: Subcontractor shall provide a dedicated and Contractor approved Supervisor and workmen to perform all required Punch List Work to prepare the Work of this Agreement for final acceptance. All Punch List Work is to be completed in a timely manner to meet the Progress Schedule. Subcontractor shall perform punch lists inclusive of: Subcontractor's punch, Contractor's punch, Architect's punch and Owner's punch.
